appDescription.message: Educational tool to identify logical fallacies in vegan advocacy debates

section_analyze_description.message: Paste any argument and the system will detect logical fallacies automatically

textarea_placeholder.message: Paste an argument here to analyze for logical fallacies...

section_snippets_description.message: Copy these pre-written responses tailored to the detected fallacy:

feedback_no_fallacy_explanation.message: This argument doesn't contain a clear logical fallacy. It may be a reasonable point that deserves a substantive response.

snippets_hint_analyze.message: 💡 Analyze an argument first to see relevant response snippets

snippets_no_data.message: No snippets available for this fallacy type yet.

language_switch_extension_warning.message: Language switching is not available in Chrome Extension mode. Please change your Chrome language settings.
language_switch_extension_warning.description: Warning shown to Chrome Extension users
